text: Artificial intelligence is changing our world, but it also raises important ethical questions. One major concern is bias—AI systems can learn unfair patterns from data, leading to discrimination. For example, a hiring algorithm might favour one group of people over another. This is why fairness is crucial: we must design AI to treat everyone equally. Another issue is privacy; AI often collects personal data, so people need to know how their information is used. Transparency means that companies should explain how their AI makes decisions. Finally, responsible AI development requires careful thought, testing, and regulation to avoid harm. When these values are respected, AI can truly benefit society.
